content.en:
The Ka Ye Wisdom Body is very complex, and even if it can be successfully cultivated at one time, it will take at least ten extradimensional epochs.

Ye Tian confirmed that he had a high probability of being able to practice, so he began to use the Ka Ye Wisdom Leaf to cultivate the Ka Ye Wisdom Body.

He sat cross-legged on the Kaba Wisdom Leaf, operating the first layer of the Kaba Wisdom Body, an inexplicable power emanated from his body, and the extradimensional rules turned into countless rays of light to absorb special energy from the Kaba Wisdom Leaf and pour it into his body.

In this way, the process of cultivating the wisdom body of the Kasa began in this way.

This copy body is cultivating the Ka Ye wisdom body, and there is no limit to the other copy bodies, constantly urging the Yutian Lotus Platform to analyze and deduce the cultivation process, if there is a possibility of mistakes, he will also avoid it in advance.

In this way, the possibility of him cultivating the wisdom of the Kasa will be higher.

Of course, his "650" replica body will also be sacrificed one by one.

Nowadays, the cost of copying the copy body of the third realm is not small, but it is not worth mentioning compared to the harvest.

As long as you cultivate the Kasa Wisdom Body, even if you sacrifice a million copy bodies, it will be worth it.

Time passed one extradimensional era after another, and the cultivation process of his Ka Ye wisdom body was very smooth, and he did not encounter any trouble.

However, just when he was about to complete his cultivation, that is, the last step, he deduced that the cultivation process of his last step might fail, hundreds of millions of possibilities, most of them were failures, and only a very few were successful.

The point is that this last step is ever-changing, changing every moment, and although he is very sure, when he really cultivates, it is very likely that he will make mistakes.

Really.

At the last step, Ye Tian was still not very skilled, which led to the wrong step, he had already reacted, but it was too late.

Click!!!

The physical body is shattered, although it has not fallen, but the extradimensional realm in the body is about to shatter, and it has been severely damaged.

Instantly, he changed to a replica body.

"I can only cultivate again!"

Ye Tian began his second cultivation.

This time it was smoother, and with the experience of the first failure, he will do better in the last step, and the success rate will be more than 90%.

Unconsciously, another ten extradimensional epochs had passed, and Ye Tian had once again come to the last step.

This time, he finally succeeded.

Rumble!!!

The multi-dimensional Daoist striped pattern of the Kasa Wisdom Body appeared on his body, gradually merging with his physical body, transforming his physical body.

Every moment, his physical body was transforming, quickly absorbing the energy around him.

He prepared a huge amount of resources, and swallowed these resources into the extradimensional realm in his body, which he used to supply his own transformation.

It took five extradimensional epochs for his physical body to complete its transformation.

"The flesh is thirty times stronger!"

Ye Tian also tested the recovery speed, which was increased by ten times.

Cultivation is still in the middle of the third realm, but his strength has already crushed those top third realm transcendent realm powerhouses.

"It's terrifying, this is the first layer of the Ka Ye wisdom body, it is much more powerful than the black mist multidimensional body, and the black mist multidimensional body I practiced before is too incomplete, and the side effects are too great, once I cultivate, it is impossible to break through to the fourth realm, and I can only choose to give up condensing the black mist multidimensional body. However, the Kasa Wisdom Body does not affect the foundation problem, and it can truly possess the Kasa Wisdom Body!"

Ye Tian plans to cultivate more of the Ka Ye wisdom body in the future, and strive to cultivate the Ka Ye wisdom body to the realm of small success and great success.

In that case, his physical body will become even more terrifying, not only will the power be terrifying, but the physical body will also become extremely tough, and at that time, the top third realm will not be able to break the defense of his physical body, but the physical body will hardly shake the existence of the third realm.

However, his extra-dimensional rule realm was still too low, and it was already fortunate that he was able to successfully cultivate the Ka Ye Wisdom Body, but if he wanted to cultivate it to a small level in a short period of time, it would be impossible.

For the time being, the first level of the first level of the Kasa wisdom body is sufficient.

Multi-dimensional wisdom light is an innate multi-dimensional secret technique against the sky, but once it is used, it will have terrible sequelae on the body.

However, by using the duplicate body to exert multi-dimensional wisdom light, he can avoid the impact on other replicated bodies, and thus eliminate the real sequelae.

The multi-dimensional wisdom light needs to be based on the extra-dimensional realm in the body, supplemented by extra-dimensional rules, and the power of the Ka Ye wisdom body, so that it can be unleashed...

Therefore, in some third realms, even if there is a clone and has practiced the Kasa Wisdom Body, there is no way for the clone to exert multi-dimensional wisdom light, unless the clone is also the same as the real body, and has the extra-dimensional realm in the body.

But it would be too rare to be able to make the clone also cultivate to the transcendent realm of the third realm.

Even if most of the clones are refined, they do not have the potential to break through to the third realm, and they are born with defects, only some special clones have extremely powerful physical bodies, which have the combat power of the third realm, similar to the route of extradimensional creatures.

In that case, it will not be possible to display multi-dimensional wisdom light.

"Only I can truly bring out the usefulness of multi-dimensional wisdom light!"

Ye Tian immediately condensed a replica body, allowing this replica body to exert multi-dimensional wisdom light.

Soon, a replica body condensed and began to cast multi-dimensional wisdom light.

Rumble!!!!!

As the multi-dimensional wisdom light was unleashed, the potential of his replicating body and his physical body began to be damaged, but his soul will seemed to be transformed, and his thinking was raised to an unimaginable multidimensional level.

In this state, it is much easier to comprehend the extradimensional rules.

"Great, in this state, it will be very easy for me to comprehend an extradimensional rule into an extradimensional rule!"

Next, he continued to exert multi-dimensional wisdom light, so that his comprehension was increased many times.

Gradually, his extradimensional rule realm improved rapidly.

After a period of 4.4 years, his extradimensional rules have reached 99,000 filaments, and he is getting closer and closer to the 100,000 filaments extradimensional rules, that is, the one-percent extradimensional rules.

this day.

The comprehension of 100,000 superdimensional rules has been successful.

Rumble!!!!!

The 100,000 extra-dimensional rules began to merge, and gradually turned into a super-dimensional rule that was condensed countless times, which was a super-dimensional rule.

One extra-dimensional rule is the one-dimensional realm, and only by condensing ten extra-dimensional rules can it be the two-dimensional realm.

After that, Ye Tian's goal was to comprehend one super-dimensional rule after another, but if he wanted to comprehend another extra-dimensional rule in the future, he couldn't accumulate from a trace of super-dimensional rules, and once he comprehended it, it was directly two extra-dimensional rules.

So, every progress after that will be extremely difficult.
